enum AuthMode {
    Disabled,
    TokenAuth { token: String },
    ApiKeyAuth { api_key: String },
}

impl AuthMode {
    fn is_enabled(&self) -> bool {
        !matches!(self, AuthMode::Disabled)
    }
}

enum TlsConfig {
    Disabled,
    Enabled { cert_path: String, key_path: String },
}

struct DatabaseConfig {
    tls: TlsConfig,
}
